projectDescription: An interactive 3D bedroom portfolio built with React Three Fiber, where visitors explore a virtual room and click on a PC to view the owner's portfolio website embedded in a monitor.
keyFeatures: Interactive 3D bedroom scene rendered with React Three Fiber and a GLTF model
Click-to-zoom interaction that focuses on the in-scene monitor showing the live portfolio site
Dynamic time-of-day lighting system (dawn, morning, evening, dusk, night) using @react-three/drei Environment presets
Real-time clock display that auto-sets the lighting preset based on the current time
Smooth GSAP-powered camera animations for position and rotation transitions
Responsive design with different camera positions for portrait/landscape and various aspect ratios
Retro pixel-style font and UI overlay with GitHub/LinkedIn social links
Custom loading screen with responsive desktop/mobile background images
publicApiSurface: Computer({ showDetails, periodOfDay }) — 3D bedroom scene component
Home() — Main page component orchestrating the Canvas, Loader, and UI overlays
Loader() — Animated loading screen with responsive background
getPeriodOfDay(hours) — Maps hour of day to an Environment preset name
MyCameraReactsToStateChanges() — R3F frame hook that locks camera position/rotation
handleMeshClick(newPosition, newRotation, newMatrix) — Triggers zoom-in animation to the monitor
